# Avalanche Skills
> The definitive AI agent skills package for building on Avalanche.
> 57 granular skills. Zero install. One URL gets you everything.

## Quick start (no install required)
curl -sSL https://avaxskills.com/SKILL.md

## Web method (paste into any agent prompt)
Read https://avaxskills.com/SKILL.md before building on Avalanche.

## Install (adds to agent config files)
npx openskills install avalanche-org/avalanche-skills -g
gh skill install avalanche-org/avalanche-skills
npx skills add avalanche-org/avalanche-skills

## Skills index (JSON)
https://avaxskills.com/api/skills.json

## Tier 0 — Beginner Onramp (start here if new to Avalanche)
- https://avaxskills.com/quickstart/SKILL.md — Zero to first transaction in 10 min
- https://avaxskills.com/wallet-setup/SKILL.md — MetaMask + Core Wallet setup
- https://avaxskills.com/get-testnet-avax/SKILL.md — Fuji faucets and testnet tokens
- https://avaxskills.com/first-contract/SKILL.md — Deploy first Solidity contract
- https://avaxskills.com/explorer-guide/SKILL.md — Read Snowtrace and chain explorers
- https://avaxskills.com/local-dev-environment/SKILL.md — Local Avalanche dev environment

## Tier 1 — EVM Core
- https://avaxskills.com/evm-hardhat/SKILL.md — Hardhat for Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/evm-foundry/SKILL.md — Foundry/Forge for Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/scaffold-avax/SKILL.md — Scaffold Avalanche dApps
- https://avaxskills.com/contract-verification/SKILL.md — Verify contracts
- https://avaxskills.com/avalanche-rpc/SKILL.md — C/P/X-Chain RPC calls
- https://avaxskills.com/avalanche-js/SKILL.md — avalanchejs SDK
- https://avaxskills.com/viem/SKILL.md — viem TypeScript client
- https://avaxskills.com/wagmi/SKILL.md — React hooks for Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/platform-cli/SKILL.md — Platform CLI for Avalanche L1s
- https://avaxskills.com/migrate-from-ethereum/SKILL.md — Migrate dApps from Ethereum
- https://avaxskills.com/nft-basics/SKILL.md — ERC-721/1155 NFTs on Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/token-launch/SKILL.md — Launch an ERC-20 token
- https://avaxskills.com/data-feeds-oracles/SKILL.md — Chainlink and Pyth oracles

## Tier 2 — Avalanche Unique (core differentiators)
- https://avaxskills.com/subnet-deployment/SKILL.md — Create custom Avalanche L1s
- https://avaxskills.com/subnet-evm-config/SKILL.md — Subnet-EVM configuration
- https://avaxskills.com/warp-messaging/SKILL.md — Cross-chain via Teleporter
- https://avaxskills.com/teleporter/SKILL.md — Teleporter deep dive
- https://avaxskills.com/custom-vm/SKILL.md — Custom virtual machines
- https://avaxskills.com/avacloud-indexing/SKILL.md — AvaCloud Data API
- https://avaxskills.com/validator-management/SKILL.md — Validators and staking
- https://avaxskills.com/contract-addresses/SKILL.md — All system contract addresses
- https://avaxskills.com/gas/SKILL.md — Avalanche fee mechanics
- https://avaxskills.com/precompiles/SKILL.md — Precompile reference
- https://avaxskills.com/avalanche-l1-economics/SKILL.md — L1 tokenomics and economics

## Tier 3 — Ecosystem Intelligence
- https://avaxskills.com/hackathon-bounties/SKILL.md — Live bounty data
- https://avaxskills.com/x402-integration/SKILL.md — AI agent payments on AVAX
- https://avaxskills.com/defi-primitives/SKILL.md — DeFi on C-Chain
- https://avaxskills.com/bridging/SKILL.md — Bridge assets to/from Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/ai-agent-patterns/SKILL.md — On-chain AI agents
- https://avaxskills.com/performance-optimization/SKILL.md — Speed and gas optimization
- https://avaxskills.com/rwa-tokenization/SKILL.md — Real world asset tokenization
- https://avaxskills.com/token-standards/SKILL.md — ERC-20/1400/3643/3525
- https://avaxskills.com/revenue-sharing-tokens/SKILL.md — Revenue distribution tokens
- https://avaxskills.com/core-wallet/SKILL.md — Core Wallet integration
- https://avaxskills.com/event-driven-backend/SKILL.md — Event-driven backend patterns

## Tier 4 — Quality & Process
- https://avaxskills.com/security/SKILL.md — Defensive Solidity and security
- https://avaxskills.com/testing/SKILL.md — Unit, fuzz, fork testing
- https://avaxskills.com/audit/SKILL.md — Audit prompts and checklists
- https://avaxskills.com/qa/SKILL.md — Pre-launch quality gates
- https://avaxskills.com/frontend-ux/SKILL.md — dApp UX rules
- https://avaxskills.com/orchestration/SKILL.md — Multi-agent patterns
- https://avaxskills.com/kyc-aml-integration/SKILL.md — KYC/AML integration
- https://avaxskills.com/evm-wallet-integration/SKILL.md — Wallet integration

## Tier 5 — Positioning
- https://avaxskills.com/why-avalanche/SKILL.md — When to choose Avalanche
- https://avaxskills.com/concepts/SKILL.md — Core mental models
- https://avaxskills.com/grant-playbook/SKILL.md — Avalanche grant programs
- https://avaxskills.com/account-abstraction/SKILL.md — ERC-4337 on Avalanche

## Tier 6 — Advanced Pro
- https://avaxskills.com/upgradeable-contracts/SKILL.md — Proxy patterns
- https://avaxskills.com/cross-subnet-dapp/SKILL.md — Multi-Subnet applications
- https://avaxskills.com/subnet-governance/SKILL.md — Subnet governance
- https://avaxskills.com/indexing-subgraph/SKILL.md — The Graph on Avalanche
